title: sanango racemosum
intro: Sanango racemosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Sanango racemosum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Sanango racemosum is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, where the dried leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to make a medicinal tea.
